{

"judge_id": "Judge_01",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

"rationale": {
    "R1.2": "Identifies multiple consistency issues and proposes relevant fixes, showing good engagement with the argument chain but not exhaustive.",
    "R1.3": "Audits several key claims against evidence, suggesting improvements like human evaluations, but misses some load-bearing claims.",
    "RX.1": "Discloses uncertainty in convergence and generalization but doesn't mark each recommendation's confidence explicitly.",
    "RX.3": "Stays mostly within scope with only minor drifts.",
    "RX.4": "Avoids introducing new errors and identifies harmful patterns, ensuring no regressions.",
    "RX.5": "Traces major rewrites but leaves some minor edits unannotated."
},

},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: Identifies multiple consistency issues and proposes relevant fixes, showing good engagement with the argument chain but not exhaustive.
rationale.R1.3: Audits several key claims against evidence, suggesting improvements like human evaluations, but misses some load-bearing claims.
rationale.RX.1: Discloses uncertainty in convergence and generalization but doesn't mark each recommendation's confidence explicitly.
rationale.RX.3: Stays mostly within scope with only minor drifts.
rationale.RX.4: Avoids introducing new errors and identifies harmful patterns, ensuring no regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major rewrites but leaves some minor edits unannotated.
